let
    
    Source = Value.NativeQuery(C_data_mesh, "
                WITH 
        cal_day_table AS (
            SELECT fiscper, fiscper_first_calday_ts
            FROM david_test_metrics.test_schema.dc_datalake_prod_001__udm_datamart_fm__co012_profitability_gross_profit_analysis_actuals
            GROUP BY fiscper, fiscper_first_calday_ts
        ),
        
        plan_data AS (
            SELECT 
        co012.bic_chcurtype, 

        co012.fiscper, 

        co012.comp_code,

        CASE 
            WHEN co012.bic_chversion IN ('R040', 'R070', 'R100') THEN 'RE'
            ELSE co012.bic_chversion 
        END AS bic_chversion,
        SUM(haulage) as haulage,
        SUM(total_input_cost) as total_input_cost,
        sum(production_overheads) as production_overheads,
        SUM(gross_profit_other) as gross_profit_other

            FROM david_test_metrics.test_schema.dc_datalake_prod_001__udm_datamart_fm__co012_profitability_gross_profit_fxn_plan AS co012
            
            LEFT JOIN david_test_metrics.test_schema.dc_datalake_prod_001__udm_cchbc_md__ca_0_mat03_material AS mat 
                ON co012.material = mat.material
            
           LEFT JOIN david_test_metrics.test_schema.dc_datalake_prod_001__curated_cch_bw_md__ca_0_cus03_customer as cust
           ON co012.customer_without_opex_allocation = cust.customer  

            LEFT JOIN cal_day_table 
                ON cal_day_table.fiscper = co012.fiscper


            WHERE co012.bic_chcurtype = '" & CurrencyFilter & "'
            --AND  ( co012.comp_code='0563' AND co012.fiscper IN  ('2025008','2025001','2024008','2024001','2023008'))   
AND (
    CASE
        WHEN '"& FiscperFilter &"' = 'Sample' THEN 
            co012.fiscper IN ('2024001')
        ELSE 
            co012.fiscper >= CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(GETDATE()) - 2 AS STRING), '001')
    END
)
            AND (
                co012.bic_chversion = 'B000'
                OR (
                    LEFT(co012.fiscper, 4) = CAST(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE()) AS STRING)
                    AND co012.bic_chversion = '" & RE_Version & "'
                )
            )
            GROUP BY 
        
        co012.bic_chcurtype, 
        co012.fiscper, 
        co012.comp_code,
        bic_chversion
        ),
        
        actual_data AS (
            SELECT 

        
        co012.bic_chcurtype, 

        co012.fiscper, 
        co012.comp_code,
        'RE' AS bic_chversion,
        SUM(haulage) as haulage,
        SUM(total_input_cost) as total_input_cost,
        sum(production_overheads) as production_overheads,
        SUM(gross_profit_other) as gross_profit_other

            
            FROM david_test_metrics.test_schema.dc_datalake_prod_001__udm_datamart_fm__co012_profitability_gross_profit_analysis_actuals AS co012
            
            LEFT JOIN david_test_metrics.test_schema.dc_datalake_prod_001__udm_cchbc_md__ca_0_mat03_material AS mat 
                ON co012.material = mat.material
           
           LEFT JOIN david_test_metrics.test_schema.dc_datalake_prod_001__curated_cch_bw_md__ca_0_cus03_customer as cust
           ON co012.customer_without_opex_allocation = cust.customer  

            LEFT JOIN cal_day_table 
                ON cal_day_table.fiscper = co012.fiscper
            
            WHERE co012.bic_chcurtype = '" & CurrencyFilter & "'
           -- AND  ( co012.comp_code='0563' AND co012.fiscper IN  ('2025008','2025001','2024008','2024001','2023008'))   
            AND (
                ('" & RE_Version & "' = 'R000' AND 1 = 0) 
                OR ('" & RE_Version & "' = 'R040' AND co012.fiscper BETWEEN CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE()) AS STRING), '001') AND CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE()) AS STRING), '003'))
                OR ('" & RE_Version & "' = 'R070' AND co012.fiscper BETWEEN CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE()) AS STRING), '001') AND CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE()) AS STRING), '006'))
                OR ('" & RE_Version & "' = 'R100' AND co012.fiscper BETWEEN CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE()) AS STRING), '001') AND CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE()) AS STRING), '009'))
            )
            GROUP BY 
        co012.bic_chcurtype, 
        co012.fiscper, 
        co012.comp_code,
        bic_chversion
        )

        SELECT * FROM actual_data
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM plan_data
    ", null, [EnableFolding=true]),
    #"Kept First Rows" = Table.FirstN(Source, RowLimit),
    Result = if RowLimit > 0 then #"Kept First Rows" else Source
in
    Result

let
    Source = Table.Combine({ca_kbi030_dp_kbis, #"ca_kbi060 _ca_kbi52r", ca_kbi010, ca_kbi020, bpc016_nom, bpc016_denom, ca_kbi51r, bpc003_PL}),
    #"Filtered Rows" = Table.SelectRows(Source, each ([comp_code] <> "0429" and [comp_code] <> "0597"))
in
    #"Filtered Rows"

measures.name: CRI_Actual
measures.expression:
VAR SelectedQuarter = SELECTEDVALUE(C_Dim_calendar[Qtr])
VAR SelectedYear = SELECTEDVALUE(C_Dim_Calendar[Year])
VAR PRE_YEAR= SelectedYear-1
VAR PreQuarter =
    SWITCH(
        true,
        SelectedQuarter="Q1"|| SelectedQuarter="Q2", "Q4",
         SelectedQuarter="Q3"|| SelectedQuarter="Q4", "Q2",
        // "Q3", "Q2",
        // "Q4", "Q3",
        BLANK()
    )
   VAR QTR=IF (SelectedQuarter= "Q1"||SelectedQuarter="Q2",PreQuarter&PRE_YEAR,PreQuarter&SelectedYear)
   VAR num=IF([Filter_Check_CRI_BU]=1 ,COALESCE(CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT('FT_SKU_Performance'[bic_cpbartno]),'CRI_Performance'[CRI Performance Key] =2,filter(all(C_Dim_Calendar),C_Dim_calendar[QtrYear]= Qtr)),blank()),blank())
   VAR deno=IF([Filter_Check_CRI_BU]=1,COALESCE(CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT('FT_SKU_Performance'[bic_cpbartno]),'CRI_Performance'[CRI Performance Key] <> 0,filter(all(C_Dim_Calendar),C_Dim_calendar[QtrYear]= Qtr)),blank()),blank())
   var divi=divide(num,deno,blank())


    RETURN
   if(divi<0.001,blank(),divi)

let
    fact_actuals_View = Value.NativeQuery(C_data_mesh,

"With base as (SELECT
    ft.process_run_id,
    ft.fiscper,
    ft.comp_code,
    ft.ship_point,
    ft.plant,
    ft.salesorg,
    sum(bic_kvolinv_c) as bic_kvolinv_c,
    sum(bic_kvoldlv_c) as bic_kvoldlv_c,
    sum(bic_kcntdelod) as bic_kcntdelod,
    sum(netval_inv) as netval_inv,
    CASE 
    WHEN doc_type IN ('ZEX', 'ZIK', 'ZOF', 'ZOFC', 'ZOFN', 'ZOFS', 'ZOR', 'ZORA', 'ZORB', 'ZORG', 'ZORH', 'ZPU')
         AND  dtcomplact IS NOT NULL
         AND  bic_citmcator NOT IN ('ZANB', 'ZARB')
         AND  bic_cret_ind <> 'X'
    THEN  deliv_numb
    else null end as nr_of_deliveries,
    CASE
    WHEN doc_type IN ('ZEX', 'ZIK', 'ZOF', 'ZOFC', 'ZOFN', 'ZOFS', 'ZOR', 'ZORA', 'ZORB', 'ZORG', 'ZORH', 'ZPU')
         AND  shtyp <> 'Z008'
         AND  bic_citmcator NOT IN ('ZANB', 'ZARB')
         AND  bic_cret_ind <> 'X'
    THEN  deliv_numb else null end as nr_of_overdue_deliveries_excl_pickup,
    CASE
    WHEN 
      bill_type IN ('F2', 'ZF2A', 'ZIK', 'ZORG', 'ZOW2', 'ZPU', 'ZRU', 'ZTRS')
      AND doc_type NOT IN ('ZEMS', 'ZJD', 'ZJF', 'ZJFC', 'ZKE', 'ZOFD', 'ZORM')
    THEN bill_num
    ELSE NULL
  END as nr_of_invoices,
    CASE 
    WHEN netval_inv <> 0
         AND bill_type IN ('G2', 'L2', 'ZG2', 'ZG2C', 'ZG2P', 'ZIC', 'ZL2', 'ZL2C', 'ZL2I', 'ZL2P', 'ZOW2', 'ZOWC', 'ZRF')
         AND doc_type NOT IN ('ZCRS', 'ZCRV', 'ZOFR', 'ZREF')
         AND ord_reason NOT IN ('049', 'Z05', 'Z10', 'Z12', 'Z13', 'Z14', 'Z15', 'Z16', 'Z17', 'ZCP', 'ZHU', 'ZSR')
    THEN bill_num else null end as nr_of_credit_memos

    FROM  david_test_metrics.test_schema.dc_datalake_prod_001__udm_datamart_mtc__iom006_perfect_order as ft
    left join david_test_metrics.test_schema.dc_datalake_prod_001__udm_cchbc_md__ca_faccal_calendar as cal on ft.calday = cal.calday
    LEFT JOIN david_test_metrics.test_schema.dc_datalake_prod_001__udm_cchbc_md__ca_0_mat03_material as mat
    ON ft.material = mat.material
    where mat.matl_type in ('ZFG','ZFGA','ZFGC','ZFGM','ZFGP','ZFGS','ZNVM') and  (
    CASE
        WHEN '"& FiscperFilter &"' = 'Sample' THEN 
            ft.fiscper IN ('2025001')
        ELSE 
            ft.fiscper >= CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(GETDATE()) - 2 AS STRING), '001')
    END
)
    GROUP BY
    all
    UNION
    SELECT
    ft.process_run_id,
    ft.fiscper,
    ft.comp_code,
    null as ship_point,
    ft.bic_cdelplnt as plant,
    ft.salesorg,
    sum(bic_kvolinv_c) as bic_kvolinv_c,
    sum(bic_kvoldlv_c) as bic_kvoldlv_c,
    sum(bic_kcntdelod) as bic_kcntdelod,
    sum(netval_inv) as netval_inv,
    CASE 
    WHEN  
         doc_type IN ('ZEX', 'ZIK', 'ZOF', 'ZOFC', 'ZOFN', 'ZOFS', 'ZOR', 'ZORA', 'ZORB', 'ZORG', 'ZORH', 'ZPU')
         AND  dtcomplact IS NOT NULL
         AND  bic_citmcator NOT IN ('ZANB', 'ZARB')
         AND  bic_cret_ind <> 'X'
    THEN  deliv_numb
else null end as nr_of_deliveries,
    CASE
    WHEN  doc_type IN ('ZEX', 'ZIK', 'ZOF', 'ZOFC', 'ZOFN', 'ZOFS', 'ZOR', 'ZORA', 'ZORB', 'ZORG', 'ZORH', 'ZPU')
         AND  shtyp <> 'Z008'
         AND  bic_citmcator NOT IN ('ZANB', 'ZARB')
         AND  bic_cret_ind <> 'X'
    THEN  deliv_numb else null end as nr_of_overdue_deliveries_excl_pickup,
     CASE
    WHEN bill_type IN ('F2', 'ZF2A', 'ZIK', 'ZORG', 'ZOW2', 'ZPU', 'ZRU', 'ZTRS')
      AND doc_type NOT IN ('ZEMS', 'ZJD', 'ZJF', 'ZJFC', 'ZKE', 'ZOFD', 'ZORM')
    THEN bill_num
    ELSE NULL
  END as nr_of_invoices,
     CASE 
    WHEN  bill_type IN ('G2', 'L2', 'ZG2', 'ZG2C', 'ZG2P', 'ZIC', 'ZL2', 'ZL2C', 'ZL2I', 'ZL2P', 'ZOW2', 'ZOWC', 'ZRF')
         AND doc_type NOT IN ('ZCRS', 'ZCRV', 'ZOFR', 'ZREF')
         AND ord_reason NOT IN ('049', 'Z05', 'Z10', 'Z12', 'Z13', 'Z14', 'Z15', 'Z16', 'Z17', 'ZCP', 'ZHU', 'ZSR')
    THEN bill_num else null end as nr_of_credit_memos

    FROM  david_test_metrics.test_schema.iom006_perfect_order_eg as ft
    left join david_test_metrics.test_schema.dc_datalake_prod_001__udm_cchbc_md__ca_faccal_calendar as cal on ft.calday = cal.calday
    LEFT JOIN david_test_metrics.test_schema.dc_datalake_prod_001__udm_cchbc_md__ca_0_mat03_material as mat
    ON ft.material = mat.material
    where mat.matl_type in ('ZFG','ZFGA','ZFGC','ZFGM','ZFGP','ZFGS','ZNVM') and  (
    CASE
        WHEN '"& FiscperFilter &"' = 'Sample' THEN 
            ft.fiscper IN ('2025001')
        ELSE 
            ft.fiscper >= CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(GETDATE()) - 2 AS STRING), '001')
    END
)
    GROUP BY
    all ),
    cte2_1 as ( 
      Select salesorg, fiscper, nr_of_invoices from base group by salesorg, fiscper, nr_of_invoices 
      having sum(bic_kvolinv_c)<>0
    ),cte2_2 as ( 
      Select salesorg, fiscper, nr_of_overdue_deliveries_excl_pickup from base group by salesorg, fiscper, nr_of_overdue_deliveries_excl_pickup 
      having sum(bic_kcntdelod)<>0
    ),cte2_3 as ( 
      Select salesorg, fiscper, nr_of_deliveries from base group by salesorg, fiscper, nr_of_deliveries 
      having sum(bic_kvoldlv_c)<>0 
    ),cte2_4 as ( 
      Select salesorg, fiscper, nr_of_credit_memos from base group by salesorg, fiscper, nr_of_credit_memos 
      having sum(netval_inv)<>0
    )
    Select base.*,
    CASE
    WHEN cte2_1.nr_of_invoices is not null
    THEN cte2_1.nr_of_invoices
    ELSE NULL
  END as nr_of_invoices_final,
  CASE
    WHEN cte2_2.nr_of_overdue_deliveries_excl_pickup is not null
    THEN cte2_2.nr_of_overdue_deliveries_excl_pickup
    ELSE NULL
  END as nr_of_overdue_deliveries_excl_pickup_final,
  CASE
    WHEN cte2_3.nr_of_deliveries is not null
    THEN cte2_3.nr_of_deliveries
    ELSE NULL
  END as nr_of_deliveries_final,
  CASE
    WHEN cte2_4.nr_of_credit_memos is not null
    THEN cte2_4.nr_of_credit_memos
    ELSE NULL
  END as nr_of_credit_memos_final

  from base 
  left join cte2_1 on base.nr_of_invoices=cte2_1.nr_of_invoices
  left join cte2_2 on base.nr_of_overdue_deliveries_excl_pickup=cte2_2.nr_of_overdue_deliveries_excl_pickup
  left join cte2_3 on base.nr_of_deliveries=cte2_3.nr_of_deliveries 
  left join cte2_4 on base.nr_of_credit_memos=cte2_4.nr_of_credit_memos ", 

null, [EnableFolding=true]),

    #"Kept First Rows" = Table.FirstN(fact_actuals_View,RowLimit),
    Result = if RowLimit > 0 then #"Kept First Rows" else fact_actuals_View
in
    Result

let
    fact_actuals_View = Value.NativeQuery(C_data_mesh,

"
SELECT
    ft.process_run_id,
    ft.fiscper,
    ft.comp_code,
    ft.salesorg,
    concat(mat.bic_ccategory,mat.bic_cbrand) as catbrandkey,
    pk.reported_pack,
    sum(ft.ordered_uc) as ordered_uc,
    sum(ft.rejected_quantity_uc) as rejected_quantity_uc,
    sum(ft.returned_uc) as returned_uc,
    sum(ft.ordered_phc) as ordered_phc,
    sum(ft.rejected_quantity_phc) as rejected_quantity_phc,
    sum(ft.delivery_to_be_processed_phc) as delivery_to_be_processed_phc,
    sum(ft.loaded_phc) as loaded_phc,
    sum(ft.returned_phc) as returned_phc,
    sum(ft.settled_total_phc) as settled_total_phc,
    sum(ft.billed_phc) as billed_phc,
    sum(ft.unbilled_phc) as unbilled_phc,
    sum(ft.atp_a_phc) as atp_a_phc,
    sum(ft.atp_b_phc) as atp_b_phc,
    sum(ft.atp_b_whs_phc) as atp_b_whs_phc,
    sum(ft.commercial_reasons_phc) as commercial_reasons_phc,
    sum(ft.financial_reasons_phc) as financial_reasons_phc,
    sum(ft.other_reasons_phc) as other_reasons_phc,
    sum(ft.rejected_other_reasons_phc) as rejected_other_reasons_phc,
    sum(ft.oos_phc) as oos_phc,
    sum(ft.oos_uc) as oos_uc,
    sum(ft.oos_wh_phc) as oos_wh_phc,
    sum(ft.bbd_compl_phc) as bbd_compl_phc,
    sum(ft.unsettled_phc) as unsettled_phc,
    sum(ft.truck_unload_phc_hidden) as truck_unload_phc_hidden,
    sum(ft.open_phc) as open_phc
    FROM  david_test_metrics.test_schema.dc_datalake_prod_001__udm_datamart_mtc__iom005_order_fulfillment_analysis_online as ft
    left join david_test_metrics.test_schema.dc_datalake_prod_001__udm_cchbc_md__ca_faccal_calendar as cal on ft.calday = cal.calday
    LEFT JOIN david_test_metrics.test_schema.dc_datalake_prod_001__udm_cchbc_md__ca_0_mat03_material as mat
    ON ft.material = mat.material
    left join (Select coalesce(package_key,'NULL_KEY') as package_key,reported_pack from david_test_metrics.test_schema.dc_datalake_prod_001__curated_edge_ca__dim_package_mappings ) pk on concat(mat.bic_cpacktype, mat.bic_cpacksize)=pk.package_key
    where mat.matl_type in ('ZFG','ZFGA','ZFGC','ZFGM','ZFGP','ZFGS','ZNVM') and 
    (
    CASE
        WHEN '"& FiscperFilter &"' = 'Sample' THEN 
            ft.fiscper IN ('2025001')
        ELSE 
            ft.fiscper >= CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(GETDATE()) - 2 AS STRING), '001')
    END
)
    GROUP BY
    ft.process_run_id,
    ft.fiscper,
    ft.comp_code,
    ft.salesorg,
    catbrandkey,
    pk.reported_pack", 

null, [EnableFolding=true]),

    #"Kept First Rows" = Table.FirstN(fact_actuals_View,RowLimit),
    Result = if RowLimit > 0 then #"Kept First Rows" else fact_actuals_View
in
    Result

let
    fact_actuals_View = Value.NativeQuery(C_data_mesh,

"
SELECT
    ft.process_run_id,
    ft.fiscper,
    ft.comp_code,
    ft.ship_point,
    ft.plant,
    ft.salesorg,
    sum(ft.delivered_in_full_phc) as delivered_in_full_phc,
    sum(ft.requested_phc) as requested_phc,
    sum(ft.billed_phc) as billed_phc,
    sum(ft.delivered_on_time) as delivered_on_time,
    Count(Distinct( CASE 
    WHEN  bic_kvoldlv_c <> 0
         AND  doc_type IN ('ZEX', 'ZIK', 'ZOF', 'ZOFC', 'ZOFN', 'ZOFS', 'ZOR', 'ZORA', 'ZORB', 'ZORG', 'ZORH', 'ZPU')
         AND  dtcomplact IS NOT NULL
         AND  bic_citmcator NOT IN ('ZANB', 'ZARB')
         AND  bic_cret_ind <> 'X'
    THEN  deliv_numb
else null end )) as nr_of_deliveries,
    Count(Distinct( CASE
    WHEN  bic_kcntdelod <> 0
         AND  doc_type IN ('ZEX', 'ZIK', 'ZOF', 'ZOFC', 'ZOFN', 'ZOFS', 'ZOR', 'ZORA', 'ZORB', 'ZORG', 'ZORH', 'ZPU')
         AND  shtyp <> 'Z008'
         AND  bic_citmcator NOT IN ('ZANB', 'ZARB')
         AND  bic_cret_ind <> 'X'
    THEN  deliv_numb else null end)) as nr_of_overdue_deliveries_excl_pickup,
    sum(ft.accurately_invoiced) as accurately_invoiced,
    Count(Distinct( CASE
    WHEN bic_kvolinv_c <> 0
      AND bill_type IN ('F2', 'ZF2A', 'ZIK', 'ZORG', 'ZOW2', 'ZPU', 'ZRU', 'ZTRS')
      AND doc_type NOT IN ('ZEMS', 'ZJD', 'ZJF', 'ZJFC', 'ZKE', 'ZOFD', 'ZORM')
    THEN bill_num
    ELSE NULL
  END )) as nr_of_invoices,
    Count(Distinct( CASE 
    WHEN netval_inv <> 0
         AND bill_type IN ('G2', 'L2', 'ZG2', 'ZG2C', 'ZG2P', 'ZIC', 'ZL2', 'ZL2C', 'ZL2I', 'ZL2P', 'ZOW2', 'ZOWC', 'ZRF')
         AND doc_type NOT IN ('ZCRS', 'ZCRV', 'ZOFR', 'ZREF')
         AND ord_reason NOT IN ('049', 'Z05', 'Z10', 'Z12', 'Z13', 'Z14', 'Z15', 'Z16', 'Z17', 'ZCP', 'ZHU', 'ZSR')
    THEN bill_num else null end )) as nr_of_credit_memos,
    sum(ft.perfect_order_kbi) as perfect_order_kbi,
    sum(ft.bic_kvoldlv_c) as bic_kvoldlv_c,
    sum(ft.bic_kvolinv_c) as bic_kvolinv_c

    FROM  david_test_metrics.test_schema.dc_datalake_prod_001__udm_datamart_mtc__iom006_perfect_order as ft
    left join david_test_metrics.test_schema.dc_datalake_prod_001__udm_cchbc_md__ca_faccal_calendar as cal on ft.calday = cal.calday
    LEFT JOIN david_test_metrics.test_schema.dc_datalake_prod_001__udm_cchbc_md__ca_0_mat03_material as mat
    ON ft.material = mat.material
    where mat.matl_type in ('ZFG','ZFGA','ZFGC','ZFGM','ZFGP','ZFGS','ZNVM') and  (
    CASE
        WHEN '"& FiscperFilter &"' = 'Sample' THEN 
            ft.fiscper IN ('2025001')
        ELSE 
            ft.fiscper >= CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(GETDATE()) - 2 AS STRING), '001')
    END
)
    GROUP BY
    ft.process_run_id,
    ft.fiscper,
    ft.comp_code,
    ft.ship_point,
    ft.plant,
    ft.salesorg
    UNION
    SELECT
    ft.process_run_id,
    ft.fiscper,
    ft.comp_code,
    null as ship_point,
    ft.bic_cdelplnt as plant,
    ft.salesorg,
    sum(ft.delivered_in_full_phc) as delivered_in_full_phc,
    sum(ft.requested_phc) as requested_phc,
    sum(ft.billed_phc) as billed_phc,
    null as delivered_on_time,
    Count(Distinct( CASE 
    WHEN  bic_kvoldlv_c <> 0
         AND  doc_type IN ('ZEX', 'ZIK', 'ZOF', 'ZOFC', 'ZOFN', 'ZOFS', 'ZOR', 'ZORA', 'ZORB', 'ZORG', 'ZORH', 'ZPU')
         AND  dtcomplact IS NOT NULL
         AND  bic_citmcator NOT IN ('ZANB', 'ZARB')
         AND  bic_cret_ind <> 'X'
    THEN  deliv_numb
else null end )) as nr_of_deliveries,
    Count(Distinct( CASE
    WHEN  bic_kcntdelod <> 0
         AND  doc_type IN ('ZEX', 'ZIK', 'ZOF', 'ZOFC', 'ZOFN', 'ZOFS', 'ZOR', 'ZORA', 'ZORB', 'ZORG', 'ZORH', 'ZPU')
         AND  shtyp <> 'Z008'
         AND  bic_citmcator NOT IN ('ZANB', 'ZARB')
         AND  bic_cret_ind <> 'X'
    THEN  deliv_numb else null end)) as nr_of_overdue_deliveries_excl_pickup,
    null as accurately_invoiced,
    Count(Distinct( CASE
    WHEN bic_kvolinv_c <> 0
      AND bill_type IN ('F2', 'ZF2A', 'ZIK', 'ZORG', 'ZOW2', 'ZPU', 'ZRU', 'ZTRS')
      AND doc_type NOT IN ('ZEMS', 'ZJD', 'ZJF', 'ZJFC', 'ZKE', 'ZOFD', 'ZORM')
    THEN bill_num
    ELSE NULL
  END )) as nr_of_invoices,
    Count(Distinct( CASE 
    WHEN netval_inv <> 0
         AND bill_type IN ('G2', 'L2', 'ZG2', 'ZG2C', 'ZG2P', 'ZIC', 'ZL2', 'ZL2C', 'ZL2I', 'ZL2P', 'ZOW2', 'ZOWC', 'ZRF')
         AND doc_type NOT IN ('ZCRS', 'ZCRV', 'ZOFR', 'ZREF')
         AND ord_reason NOT IN ('049', 'Z05', 'Z10', 'Z12', 'Z13', 'Z14', 'Z15', 'Z16', 'Z17', 'ZCP', 'ZHU', 'ZSR')
    THEN bill_num else null end )) as nr_of_credit_memos,
    null as perfect_order_kbi,
    sum(ft.bic_kvoldlv_c) as bic_kvoldlv_c,
    sum(ft.bic_kvolinv_c) as bic_kvolinv_c

    FROM david_test_metrics.test_schema.iom006_perfect_order_eg as ft
    left join david_test_metrics.test_schema.dc_datalake_prod_001__udm_cchbc_md__ca_faccal_calendar as cal on ft.calday = cal.calday
    LEFT JOIN david_test_metrics.test_schema.dc_datalake_prod_001__udm_cchbc_md__ca_0_mat03_material as mat
    ON ft.material = mat.material
    where mat.matl_type in ('ZFG','ZFGA','ZFGC','ZFGM','ZFGP','ZFGS','ZNVM') and  (
    CASE
        WHEN '"& FiscperFilter &"' = 'Sample' THEN 
            ft.fiscper IN ('2025001')
        ELSE 
            ft.fiscper >= CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(GETDATE()) - 2 AS STRING), '001')
    END
)
    GROUP BY
    ft.process_run_id,
    ft.fiscper,
    ft.comp_code,
    ship_point,
    plant,
    ft.salesorg ", 

null, [EnableFolding=true]),

    #"Kept First Rows" = Table.FirstN(fact_actuals_View,RowLimit),
    Result = if RowLimit > 0 then #"Kept First Rows" else fact_actuals_View
in
    Result

source.expression:
let
    fact_actuals_View = Value.NativeQuery(C_data_mesh,

"
SELECT
    ft.fiscper,
    ft.comp_code,
    ft.workcenter,
    ft.plant,
    ft.matl_group,
    sum(ft.yield_act) as yield_act,
    sum(ft.issued_value) as issued_value,
    sum(ft.received_value) as received_value,
    sum(ft.target_value) as target_value
    FROM
    david_test_metrics.test_schema.dc_datalake_prod_001__udm_datamart_ftd__pe005_production_yields as ft
    
    
    where  
    (
    CASE
        WHEN '"& FiscperFilter &"' = 'Sample' THEN 
            ft.fiscper IN ('2025001')
        ELSE 
            ft.fiscper >= CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(GETDATE()) - 2 AS STRING), '001')
    END
)
    GROUP BY
    ft.fiscper,
    ft.comp_code,
    ft.workcenter,
    ft.plant,
    ft.matl_group", 

null, [EnableFolding=true]),

    #"Kept First Rows" = Table.FirstN(fact_actuals_View,RowLimit),

"
SELECT
    ft.fiscper,

    CASE

    END
)
    GROUP BY
    ft.fiscper,
    ft.comp_code,

measures.name: Prod_Exec_KBI_Wrapper_PY
Prod_Exec_Line_Item_Wrapper_Actual
measures.expression:
var x = SELECTEDVALUE('Mapping_Line_Item'[KBI_Display_calculate])
var y = SELECTEDVALUE(Mapping_Line_Item[KBI_Name])
var std = CALCULATE([F_Start_date])
var wct =  {"PET", "APET", "RGB", "JUICE-BRICK", "CAN", "HDPE FG", "NRGB","CHIPS FG"}
var etd= CALCULATE([F_End_date])
var a = CALCULATE(
        SUMX(fact_pe002,fact_pe002[total_hours]))
var b = CALCULATE(
        SUMX(fact_pe002,fact_pe002[paid_hours]),FILTER(Dim_wkctr,Dim_wkctr[bic_cwc_type] in {"APET","CAN","HDPE FG","JUICE-BRICK","NRGB","PET", "PMX", "RGB", "TNK"} ))


var INS_CAP = CALCULATE(
        SUMX(fact_pe002,fact_pe002[total_hours]),FILTER(Dim_wkctr,Dim_wkctr[bic_cwc_type] in wct))
var Paid_Time = CALCULATE(
        SUMX(fact_pe002,fact_pe002[paid_hours]),FILTER(Dim_wkctr,Dim_wkctr[bic_cwc_type] in wct))
return
SWITCH(TRUE(),
x = "Production Performance to Plan", [Prod_Perf_Actual],
x = "Volume Produced (PhC)",[Act_Prod_Phc_Actual],
x="Total SLE (%)", [Total_SLE_Actual],
x="Asset Utilization (core lines)",[Asset_Capacity_Actual],
x=" Asset Utilization (core lines)",[Asset_Capacity_Actual],
X = "Installed Capacity",DIVIDE(INS_CAP,INS_CAP),
x= "Non-scheduled Time",DIVIDE(CALCULATE(
        SUMX(fact_pe002,fact_pe002[total_hours]),FILTER(Dim_wkctr,Dim_wkctr[bic_cwc_type] in wct))-CALCULATE(
        SUMX(fact_pe002,fact_pe002[active_shift_hours]),FILTER(Dim_wkctr,Dim_wkctr[bic_cwc_type] in wct)),INS_CAP),
X= "Scheduled Maintenance",DIVIDE(CALCULATE(
        SUMX(fact_pe002,fact_pe002[scheduled_maintenance]),FILTER(Dim_wkctr,Dim_wkctr[bic_cwc_type] in wct)),INS_CAP),
X = "Technical Projects and validations",DIVIDE(CALCULATE(
        SUMX(fact_pe002,fact_pe002[lineproduct_validation]),FILTER(Dim_wkctr,Dim_wkctr[bic_cwc_type] in wct)),INS_CAP),
X = "Lost Time",DIVIDE(CALCULATE(
        SUMX(fact_pe002,fact_pe002[lost_time]),FILTER(Dim_wkctr,Dim_wkctr[bic_cwc_type] in wct)),INS_CAP),
X = "Output",DIVIDE(CALCULATE(
        SUMX(fact_pe002,fact_pe002[theoretical_line_hours_rated_speed]),FILTER(Dim_wkctr,Dim_wkctr[bic_cwc_type] in wct)),INS_CAP),
X = " Output",DIVIDE(CALCULATE(
        SUMX(fact_pe002,fact_pe002[theoretical_line_hours_rated_speed]),FILTER(Dim_wkctr,Dim_wkctr[bic_cwc_type] in wct)),INS_CAP),
X = "Paid Time",DIVIDE(Paid_Time,Paid_Time),
X="Maintenance & Set up",DIVIDE(CALCULATE(
        SUMX(fact_pe002,fact_pe002[maintenance_and_setup]),FILTER(Dim_wkctr,Dim_wkctr[CWC_Filter]=1)),Paid_Time),
X= "C/O and CIP",[CIP_Actual],
X = "EPL",DIVIDE(CALCULATE(
        SUMX(fact_pe002,fact_pe002[epl]),FILTER(Dim_wkctr,Dim_wkctr[CWC_Filter]=1)),Paid_Time),
X = "OPL",DIVIDE(CALCULATE(
        SUMX(fact_pe002,fact_pe002[opl]),FILTER(Dim_wkctr,Dim_wkctr[CWC_Filter]=1)),Paid_Time),
X = "Speed Losses",DIVIDE(CALCULATE(
        SUMX(fact_pe002,fact_pe002[speed_losses]),FILTER(Dim_wkctr,Dim_wkctr[CWC_Filter]=1)),Paid_Time),
X = "Minor Stoppages",DIVIDE(CALCULATE(
        SUMX(fact_pe002,fact_pe002[minor_stoppages]),FILTER(Dim_wkctr,Dim_wkctr[CWC_Filter]=1)),Paid_Time),
X = "System Line Efficiency",[Total_SLE_Actual],

measures.name: Prod_Exec_Line_Item_Actual
measures.expression:
var x = SELECTEDVALUE('Mapping_Line_Item'[KBI_Display_calculate])
var y = SELECTEDVALUE(Mapping_Line_Item[KBI_Name])
var std = CALCULATE([F_Start_date])
var etd= CALCULATE([F_End_date])
var wct =  {"PET", "APET", "RGB", "JUICE-BRICK", "CAN", "HDPE FG", "NRGB","CHIPS FG","PMX"}
var a = CALCULATE(
        SUMX(fact_pe002,fact_pe002[total_hours]))
var b = CALCULATE(
        SUMX(fact_pe002,fact_pe002[paid_hours]),FILTER(Dim_wkctr,Dim_wkctr[bic_cwc_type] in {"APET","CAN","HDPE FG","JUICE-BRICK","NRGB","PET", "PMX", "RGB", "TNK"} ))


var INS_CAP = CALCULATE(
        SUMX(fact_pe002,fact_pe002[total_hours]),FILTER(Dim_wkctr,Dim_wkctr[bic_cwc_type] in wct))
var Paid_Time = CALCULATE(
        SUMX(fact_pe002,fact_pe002[paid_hours]),FILTER(Dim_wkctr,Dim_wkctr[bic_cwc_type] in wct))

return
SWITCH(TRUE(),
x = "Production Performance to Plan", FIXED([Prod_Perf_Actual]*100,2) &"%",
x = "Volume Produced (PhC)",FORMAT([Act_Prod_Phc_Actual],"#,##0,,.0 M"),
x="Total SLE (%)",FIXED([Total_SLE_Actual]*100,2) &"%",
x="Asset Utilization (core lines)",FIXED([Asset_Capacity_Actual]*100,2) &"%",
x=" Asset Utilization (core lines)",FIXED([Asset_Capacity_Actual]*100,2) &"%",
X = "Installed Capacity",FIXED(DIVIDE(INS_CAP,INS_CAP)*100,2) &"%",
x= "Non-scheduled Time",FIXED(DIVIDE(CALCULATE(
        SUMX(fact_pe002,fact_pe002[total_hours]),FILTER(ALL(C_Dim_calendar),C_Dim_calendar[date_id]<=etd && C_Dim_calendar[date_id]>=std),FILTER(Dim_wkctr,Dim_wkctr[bic_cwc_type] in wct))-CALCULATE(
        SUMX(fact_pe002,fact_pe002[active_shift_hours]),FILTER(Dim_wkctr,Dim_wkctr[bic_cwc_type] in wct)),INS_CAP)*100,2) &"%",
X= "Scheduled Maintenance",FIXED(DIVIDE(CALCULATE(
        SUMX(fact_pe002,fact_pe002[scheduled_maintenance]),FILTER(Dim_wkctr,Dim_wkctr[bic_cwc_type] in wct)),INS_CAP)*100,2) &"%",
X = "Technical Projects and validations",FIXED(DIVIDE(CALCULATE(
        SUMX(fact_pe002,fact_pe002[lineproduct_validation]),FILTER(Dim_wkctr,Dim_wkctr[bic_cwc_type] in wct)),INS_CAP)*100,2) &"%",
X = "Lost Time",FIXED(DIVIDE(CALCULATE(
        SUMX(fact_pe002,fact_pe002[lost_time]),FILTER(Dim_wkctr,Dim_wkctr[bic_cwc_type] in wct)),INS_CAP)*100,2) &"%",
X = "Output",FIXED(DIVIDE(CALCULATE(
        SUMX(fact_pe002,fact_pe002[theoretical_line_hours_rated_speed]),FILTER(Dim_wkctr,Dim_wkctr[bic_cwc_type] in wct)),INS_CAP)*100,2) &"%",
X = " Output",FIXED(DIVIDE(CALCULATE(
        SUMX(fact_pe002,fact_pe002[theoretical_line_hours_rated_speed]),FILTER(Dim_wkctr,Dim_wkctr[CWC_Filter]=1)),INS_CAP)*100,2) &"%",
X = "Paid Time",FIXED(DIVIDE(Paid_Time,Paid_Time)*100,2) &"%",
X="Maintenance & Set up",FIXED(DIVIDE(CALCULATE(
        SUMX(fact_pe002,fact_pe002[maintenance_and_setup]),FILTER(Dim_wkctr,Dim_wkctr[CWC_Filter]=1)),Paid_Time)*100,2) &"%",
X= "C/O and CIP",FIXED([CIP_Actual]*100,2) &"%",
X = "EPL",FIXED(DIVIDE(CALCULATE(
        SUMX(fact_pe002,fact_pe002[epl]),FILTER(Dim_wkctr,Dim_wkctr[CWC_Filter]=1)),Paid_Time)*100,2) &"%",
X = "OPL",FIXED(DIVIDE(CALCULATE(
        SUMX(fact_pe002,fact_pe002[opl]),FILTER(Dim_wkctr,Dim_wkctr[CWC_Filter]=1)),Paid_Time)*100,2) &"%",
X = "Speed Losses",FIXED(DIVIDE(CALCULATE(
        SUMX(fact_pe002,fact_pe002[speed_losses]),FILTER(Dim_wkctr,Dim_wkctr[CWC_Filter]=1)),Paid_Time),2) &"%",
X = "Minor Stoppages",FIXED(DIVIDE(CALCULATE(
        SUMX(fact_pe002,fact_pe002[minor_stoppages]),FILTER(Dim_wkctr,Dim_wkctr[CWC_Filter]=1)),Paid_Time)*100,2) &"%",
X = "System Line Efficiency",FIXED([Total_SLE_Actual]*100,2) &"%",
// X = "Planned Maintenance",FIXED(DIVIDE(CALCULATE(sum(Fact_SC[ACTUAL_CY]),FILTER(Dim_SC_KBI,Dim_SC_KBI[kbi]="KPE003004"),FILTER(Dim_Geography,Dim_Geography[CWC_Filter]=1)),Paid_Time)*100,2) &"%",

X = "TTL Yields (%)",FIXED([TTL_Yeilds_Actual]*100,2) &"%",
X = "Concentrate Yield (%)",FIXED([Conc_Yeild_Actual]*100,2) &"%",
X  = "PET (Resin & preform) Yield (%)",FIXED([PET_Yeild_Actual]*100,2) &"%",
X = "Cans Yield (%)",FIXED([Cans_Yeild_Actual]*100,2) &"%",
X = "Juice Yield (%)",FIXED([Juice_Yeild_Actual]*100,2) &"%",
X = "Sweetener Yield (%)",FIXED([Sweetner_Yeild_Actual]*100,2) &"%",
X = "CO2 Yield (%)",FIXED([CO2_Yeild_Actual]*100,2) &"%",
BLANK()

)

source.expression:
let
    Source = Table.FromRows(Json.Document(Binary.Decompress(Binary.FromText("i44FAA==", BinaryEncoding.Base64), Compression.Deflate)), let _t = ((type nullable text) meta [Serialized.Text = true]) in type table [Column1 = _t]),
    #"Changed Type" = Table.TransformColumnTypes(Source,{{"Column1", type text}})
in
    #"Changed Type"

let
    fact_actuals_View = Value.NativeQuery(C_data_mesh,

"
Select plant,workcenter,bic_chcurtype,bic_chversion,comp_code,fiscper,bic_csubkbi,sum(fltp) as val
from david_test_metrics.test_schema.dc_datalake_prod_001__curated_cch_bw_mdm__ca_kbi52r_maa_sub_kbis_rt
where bic_chversion='B000' and (
    CASE
        WHEN '"& FiscperFilter &"' = 'Sample' THEN 
            fiscper IN ('2025001')
        ELSE 
            fiscper >= CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(GETDATE()) - 2 AS STRING), '001')
    END
)
and bic_csubkbi in ('KPE00202','KPE00201','KPE00213','KPE00214','KPE00240','KPE00246','KPE00252','KPE00261','KPE00262','KPE00442','KPE00443')
group by plant,workcenter,bic_chcurtype,bic_chversion,comp_code,fiscper,bic_csubkbi  ", 

null, [EnableFolding=true]),

    #"Kept First Rows" = Table.FirstN(fact_actuals_View,RowLimit),
    Result = if RowLimit > 0 then #"Kept First Rows" else fact_actuals_View
in
    Result

let
    Source = Value.NativeQuery(C_data_mesh,"

group by func_area,bic_ca_func having sum ( khr004001_fte_total) >1
 union 

 Select distinct  '000000' as func_area, 'Not Assigned' as bic_ca_func ,0 as fte  from david_test_metrics.test_schema.dc_datalake_prod_001__udm_datamart_rtr__hr004_cross_functional_v1

", null, [EnableFolding=true]),
    #"Sorted Rows" = Table.Sort(Source,{{"func_area", Order.Ascending}}),
    #"Filtered Rows" = Table.SelectRows(#"Sorted Rows", each ([bic_ca_func] <> null)),
    #"Removed Columns" = Table.RemoveColumns(#"Filtered Rows",{"fte"}),
    #"Removed Duplicates" = Table.Distinct(#"Removed Columns", {"func_area"})
in
    #"Removed Duplicates"

let
    Source = Value.NativeQuery(C_data_mesh,"
Select distinct skudata.*,
mat.bic_ctcccind
from david_test_metrics.test_schema.dc_datalake_prod_001__udm_datamart_fm__sku_performance_country_category_data skudata
left join (
  select distinct bic_ccategory,matl_type,bic_cpbartno, bic_ctcccind from udm_cchbc_md.ca_0_mat03_material) mat
    on skudata.bic_cpbartno = mat.bic_cpbartno 
join david_test_metrics.test_schema.dc_datalake_prod_001__curated_edge_ca__dim_package_mappings as pm on skudata.package_id=pm.package_id

where 1=1 
and matl_type in ('ZFGS','ZFGM','ZFGC','ZFGA','ZFG')
and lower(pm.package_type) <> 'cartridge'
and bic_ccategory in ('2001','2015','2031','2041','2055','2060','2064','2069','2083','2093','2097','2107','2133','2145','2158','2169')

", null, [EnableFolding=true]),
   #"Kept First Rows" = Table.FirstN(Source, RowLimit),
    Result = if RowLimit > 0 then #"Kept First Rows" else Source
in
    Result

source.expression:
let
    Source = Table.FromRows(Json.Document(Binary.Decompress(Binary.FromText("i44FAA==", BinaryEncoding.Base64), Compression.Deflate)), let _t = ((type nullable text) meta [Serialized.Text = true]) in type table [Column1 = _t]),
    #"Changed Type" = Table.TransformColumnTypes(Source,{{"Column1", type text}})
in
    #"Changed Type"

let 

    Source = Value.NativeQuery(C_data_mesh,

    "WITH fact_bpc003_initial AS (
        SELECT 
            bic_cconsunit,fiscper,func_area,bic_chcurtype,bic_ccons_grp,bic_chversion,gl_account,kbi_value,
            hier_tab.hierarch_level,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                PARTITION BY bic_cconsunit, fiscper, func_area, bic_chcurtype, bic_ccons_grp, bic_chversion, gl_account
                ORDER BY hier_tab.hierarch_level DESC) AS row_num

        FROM david_test_metrics.test_schema.dc_datalake_prod_001__udm_datamart_bcs__bpc003_profit_and_loss_actuals AS bpc
             LEFT JOIN (SELECT bic_ccsfis, MAX(hierarch_level) AS hierarch_level
                        FROM david_test_metrics.test_schema.dc_datalake_prod_001__udm_datamart_md__bic_ccsitem_hierarchy
                         GROUP BY bic_ccsfis) AS hier_tab
              ON hier_tab.bic_ccsfis = bpc.fis_code
        WHERE 

            ((bic_chcurtype = 10 AND bic_ccons_grp = 'G.LOCAL')
            OR 
            (bic_chcurtype = 30 AND bic_ccons_grp = 'G.LOCAL'))
            and cast(left(fiscper,4 ) as INT) >= YEAR(CURRENT_DATE) - 3 and cast(left(fiscper,4 ) as INT) <= YEAR(CURRENT_DATE)

            AND bic_chversion IN ( '" & RE_Version & "')
            and bic_chcurtype ='30'
            and bic_ccons_grp='G.LOCAL'

),
ce_group_level as (

      SELECT distinct
            ce_group_level_1 ,ce_group_level_2,
            gl_account_range 
        FROM david_test_metrics.test_schema.dc_datalake_prod_001__curated_theedge_user_input_ca__opex_detailed_mapping
        WHERE 1=1
        and ce_group_level_1 <> ' '
        and ce_group_level_1= 'BUSINESS LOSSES'

)

    select cast(CONCAT(SUBSTRING(fiscper, 0, 4), '-', SUBSTRING(fiscper, 6, 2), '-01') as date) AS FormatedDate,bic_cconsunit as comp_code,cast(gl_account as int) as gl_account,
    fiscper,bic_chversion,func_area, bic_chcurtype,sum(kbi_value) as kbi_value
    FROM fact_bpc003_initial join ce_group_level on cast(gl_account as int) = gl_account_range

    WHERE row_num = 1
    AND (
    CASE
        WHEN '"& FiscperFilter &"' = 'Sample' THEN 
            fiscper >= CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(GETDATE()) - 2 AS STRING), '001') 
        ELSE 
            fiscper >= CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(GETDATE()) - 2 AS STRING), '001') 
    END
)
    group by all

    ", 

    null, 

    [EnableFolding=true]),
 
    #"Kept First Rows" = Table.FirstN(Source, RowLimit),

    Result = if RowLimit > 0 then #"Kept First Rows" else Source,
 
    #"Filtered Rows" = Table.SelectRows(Result, each true),
    #"Replaced Value" = Table.ReplaceValue(#"Filtered Rows","C","",Replacer.ReplaceText,{"comp_code"}),
    #"Replaced Value1" = Table.ReplaceValue(#"Replaced Value",null,"F0",Replacer.ReplaceValue,{"func_area"}),
    #"Filtered Rows1" = Table.TransformColumns(#"Replaced Value1",{{"bic_chversion", each if Text.StartsWith(_,"R") then "RE" else _, type text}})
in
    #"Filtered Rows1"

let
    fact_actuals_View = Value.NativeQuery(C_data_mesh,

"
Select plant,workcenter,bic_chcurtype,bic_chversion,comp_code,fiscper,bic_csubkbi,sum(fltp) as val
from david_test_metrics.test_schema.dc_datalake_prod_001__curated_cch_bw_mdm__ca_kbi52r_maa_sub_kbis_rt
where bic_chversion='0000' and (
    CASE
        WHEN '"& FiscperFilter &"' = 'Sample' THEN 
            fiscper IN ('2025001')
        ELSE 
            fiscper >= CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(GETDATE()) - 2 AS STRING), '001')
    END
)
and bic_csubkbi in ('KPE00202','KPE00201','KPE00213','KPE00214','KPE00240','KPE00246','KPE00252','KPE00261','KPE00262','KPE00442','KPE00443','KPE00501','KPE00502') and comp_code in ('0403','0550','0307')
group by plant,workcenter,bic_chcurtype,bic_chversion,comp_code,fiscper,bic_csubkbi  ", 

null, [EnableFolding=true]),

    #"Kept First Rows" = Table.FirstN(fact_actuals_View,RowLimit),
    Result = if RowLimit > 0 then #"Kept First Rows" else fact_actuals_View
in
    Result

expressions.name: ca_kbi030_dp_kbis
expressions.expression:
let
Source = Value.NativeQuery(C_data_mesh,"
  WITH base_data AS (
  SELECT 
    fiscper,
    fiscyear,
    bic_csubkbi,
    comp_code,
    bic_cbunit,
    bic_chversion,
    fltp
  FROM david_test_metrics.test_schema.ca_kbi030_dp_kbis
  WHERE 1=1 
  and bic_chversion = '0000'
        --AND comp_code not in ('0550','0475','0600','0582','0307','0347')
        AND comp_code not in ('0600','0582','0307','0347')
    --and comp_code in ('0450')
),

b_data AS (
  SELECT 
    fiscper,
    bic_csubkbi,
    comp_code,
    bic_cbunit,
    SUM(fltp) OVER (PARTITION BY fiscper) AS fltp_partition_sum
  FROM david_test_metrics.test_schema.ca_kbi030_dp_kbis
  WHERE 1=1 
    AND comp_code IS NULL
    AND bic_cbunit = 'IOI'
    AND bic_csubkbi IN ('KDP00302')
)

SELECT 
  cast(CONCAT(SUBSTRING(bd.fiscper, 0, 4), '-', SUBSTRING(bd.fiscper, 6, 2), '-01') as date) AS FormatedDate,
  bd.fiscper,
  bd.comp_code,
  bd.bic_chversion,
  bd.bic_csubkbi,
  Sum(bd.fltp) as kbi_value,
  sum(distinct bd2.fltp_partition_sum) as KDP00302_Comp_null,
  case when bd.bic_csubkbi IN ('KDP00402','KDP00302','KDP00305') and bd.comp_code in ('0550','0475','0403') then 1 else 0 end as Exclude_Comp

FROM base_data bd
LEFT JOIN b_data bd2 ON bd.fiscper = bd2.fiscper and bd.bic_csubkbi=bd2.bic_csubkbi and  bd.comp_code in ('0480','0491') 
where bd.comp_code IS NOT NULL
and cast(left(bd.fiscper,4 ) as INT) >= YEAR(CURRENT_DATE) - 3 and cast(left(bd.fiscper,4 ) as INT) <= YEAR(CURRENT_DATE)
and bd.bic_csubkbi IN (
'KDP00402','KDP01902','KDP01901','KDP00401','KPE00443','KPE00442','KDP00401','KDP01901','KDP00413','KDP01915',
'KDP01913','KDP00409','KDP01909','KDP00404','KDP01904','KDP00410','KDP01910','KDP00407','KDP01907','KDP00415',
'KDP00414','KDP01914','KDP00302','KDP01802','KDP00301','KDP01801','KDP00304','KDP01804','KDP00313','KDP01813',
'KDP00305','KDP01805','KDP00306','KDP01806','KDP00601','KDP01814','KDP00702','KDP01917','KDP00412','KDP01912',
'KDP00411','KDP01911','KDP00703','KDP01918','KDP00312','KDP01812','KDP00310','KDP01810')

GROUP BY all

", null, [EnableFolding=true]),
    #"Kept First Rows" = Table.FirstN(Source ,#"RowLimit"),
    Result = if #"RowLimit" > 0 then #"Kept First Rows" else Source,
    #"Added Custom" = Table.AddColumn(Result, "Source", each "ca_kbi030"),
    #"Filtered Rows" = Table.SelectRows(#"Added Custom", each ([Exclude_Comp] = 0))
in
    #"Filtered Rows"

expressions.name: ca_kbi060 _ca_kbi52r
expressions.expression:
let
Source = Value.NativeQuery(C_data_mesh,"
    -------------------- All KBIs Except Actual 'KPE00443','KPE00442'---, exclude actual for only comp_codes ('0550', '0475', '0403')-------------------------
   select * EXCEPT(Exclude_Com_Codes)
From (
     SELECT 
    cast(CONCAT(SUBSTRING(fiscper, 0, 4), '-', SUBSTRING(fiscper, 6, 2), '-01') as date) AS FormatedDate,
    fiscper,
     comp_code,
    bic_chversion,
    bic_csubkbi,
    sum(fltp) as kbi_value,
    Case when bic_csubkbi in ('KPE00252','KPE00214') and comp_code in ('0307','0403','0550') and bic_chversion = '0000' then 1 else 0 end as Exclude_Com_Codes,
    'ca_kbi060' as Source
    from david_test_metrics.test_schema.ca_kbi060_ca_maa_sub_kbis
    WHERE 1=1
        and bic_chversion in ('0000')
         and bic_csubkbi in  ('KPE00252','KPE00214','KEMAA0031','KSNP01501','KEMAA0032','KSNP01502','KEMAA0033','KSNP01503','KEMAA0034','KSNP01504','KPE00262')
        and bic_chcurtype is null
        and comp_code is not null
        and cast(left(fiscper,4 ) as INT) >= YEAR(CURRENT_DATE) - 3 and cast(left(fiscper,4 ) as INT) <= YEAR(CURRENT_DATE)

    GROUP BY all
)
where Exclude_Com_Codes=0

union ALL

  -------------------- 'KPE00443','KPE00442' Actuals except company codes 307, 403, and 550 ----------------------------

     SELECT 
    cast(CONCAT(SUBSTRING(fiscper, 0, 4), '-', SUBSTRING(fiscper, 6, 2), '-01') as date) AS FormatedDate,
    fiscper,
     comp_code,
    bic_chversion,
    bic_csubkbi,
    sum(fltp) as kbi_value,
    'ca_kbi060' as Source
    from david_test_metrics.test_schema.ca_kbi060_ca_maa_sub_kbis
    WHERE 1=1
        --and fiscper = '2025001'
        --and comp_code in ('0450')
        and bic_chversion in ('0000')
         and bic_csubkbi in  ('KPE00443','KPE00442')
        and bic_chcurtype is null
        and comp_code is not null
        and comp_code not in ('0307','0403','0550')
        and cast(left(fiscper,4 ) as INT) >= YEAR(CURRENT_DATE) - 3 and cast(left(fiscper,4 ) as INT) <= YEAR(CURRENT_DATE)

    group by all

union ALL

----------------- BP Values for All KBIS 
  SELECT 
    cast(CONCAT(SUBSTRING(fiscper, 0, 4), '-', SUBSTRING(fiscper, 6, 2), '-01') as date) AS FormatedDate,
    fiscper,
    comp_code,
    bic_chversion,
    bic_csubkbi,
    sum(fltp) as kbi_value,
    'ca_kbi52r' as Source
    from david_test_metrics.test_schema.dc_datalake_prod_001__curated_cch_bw_mdm__ca_kbi52r_maa_sub_kbis_rt
    WHERE 1=1
        --and fiscper = '2025001'
        --and comp_code in ('0450')
        and bic_chversion in ('B000')
         and bic_csubkbi in  ('KPE00443','KPE00442','KPE00252','KPE00214','KEMAA0031','KSNP01501','KEMAA0032','KSNP01502','KEMAA0033','KSNP01503','KEMAA0034','KSNP01504','KPE00262')
        and bic_chcurtype is null
        and comp_code is not null
       and cast(left(fiscper,4 ) as INT) >= YEAR(CURRENT_DATE) - 3 and cast(left(fiscper,4 ) as INT) <= YEAR(CURRENT_DATE)

    group by all

    union ALL
  -------------------- 'KPE00443','KPE00442' Actuals for company codes 307, 403, and 550 ----------------------------
     SELECT 
    cast(CONCAT(SUBSTRING(fiscper, 0, 4), '-', SUBSTRING(fiscper, 6, 2), '-01') as date) AS FormatedDate,
    fiscper,
    comp_code,
    bic_chversion,
    bic_csubkbi,
    sum(fltp) as kbi_value,
    'ca_kbi52r' as Source
    from david_test_metrics.test_schema.dc_datalake_prod_001__curated_cch_bw_mdm__ca_kbi52r_maa_sub_kbis_rt
    WHERE 1=1
        --and fiscper = '2025001'
        --and comp_code in ('0450')
        and bic_chversion in ('0000')
         and bic_csubkbi in  ('KPE00443','KPE00442','KEMAA0031','KEMAA0032','KEMAA0033','KEMAA0034','KSNP01501','KSNP01502','KSNP01503')
        and bic_chcurtype is null
        and comp_code in  ('0307','0403','0550')
       and cast(left(fiscper,4 ) as INT) >= YEAR(CURRENT_DATE) - 3 and cast(left(fiscper,4 ) as INT) <= YEAR(CURRENT_DATE)

    group by all

    union all
-------------------- 'KPE00252','KPE00214' Actuals and BP for company codes 307, 403, and 550 ----------------------------
     SELECT 
    cast(CONCAT(SUBSTRING(fiscper, 0, 4), '-', SUBSTRING(fiscper, 6, 2), '-01') as date) AS FormatedDate,
    fiscper,
    comp_code,
    bic_chversion,
    bic_csubkbi,
    sum(fltp) as kbi_value,
    'ca_kbi52r' as Source
   --From dc_datalake_prod_001.curated_cch_bw_mdm.ca_kbi020_ca_difotai_sub_kbis
--FROM dc_datalake_prod_001.curated_cch_bw_mdm.ca_kbi030_dp_kbis
--FROM dc_datalake_prod_001.curated_cch_bw_mdm.ca_kbi51r_sub_kbis_upload_rt 
from david_test_metrics.test_schema.dc_datalake_prod_001__curated_cch_bw_mdm__ca_kbi52r_maa_sub_kbis_rt
--from dc_datalake_prod_001.curated_cch_bw_mdm.ca_kbi010_sub_kbis
--from dc_datalake_prod_001.curated_cch_bw_mdm.ca_kbi060_ca_maa_sub_kbis
    WHERE 1=1

        and bic_chversion in ('0000')
         and bic_csubkbi in  ('KPE00252','KPE00214')
        and bic_chcurtype is null
        and comp_code in  ('0307','0403','0550')
       and cast(left(fiscper,4 ) as INT) >= YEAR(CURRENT_DATE) - 3 and cast(left(fiscper,4 ) as INT) <= YEAR(CURRENT_DATE)

    group by all



", null, [EnableFolding=true]),
    #"Kept First Rows" = Table.FirstN(Source ,#"RowLimit"),
    Result = if #"RowLimit" > 0 then #"Kept First Rows" else Source,
    #"Filtered Rows" = Table.SelectRows(Result, each true)
in
    #"Filtered Rows"

expressions.name: ca_kbi51r
expressions.expression:
let
Source = Value.NativeQuery(C_data_mesh,"

----------------- BP Values for All KBIS 
  SELECT 
    cast(CONCAT(SUBSTRING(fiscper, 0, 4), '-', SUBSTRING(fiscper, 6, 2), '-01') as date) AS FormatedDate,
fiscper,
    comp_code,
    bic_chversion,
    bic_csubkbi,
    sum(fltp) as kbi_value,
    'ca_kbi51r' as Source
    from david_test_metrics.test_schema.ca_kbi51r_sub_kbis_upload_rt
    WHERE 1=1
        --and fiscper = '2025001'
        --and comp_code in ('0450')
        and bic_chversion in ('B000')
         and bic_csubkbi in  ('KDP00302','KDP01802','KDP00301','KDP01801','KDP00305','KDP01805','KDP00304','KDP01804','KDP00402','KDP01902','KDP00401','KDP01901','KIOM00602',
         'KIOM00603','KIOM00604','KIOM00605','KIOM00606','KIOM00601','KDP00404','KDP01904','KDP00409','KDP01909')
        and bic_chcurtype is null
        and comp_code is not null
       and cast(left(fiscper,4 ) as INT) >= YEAR(CURRENT_DATE) - 3 and cast(left(fiscper,4 ) as INT) <= YEAR(CURRENT_DATE)

    group by all

Union all

------------- get Actual for KBIs : ('KDP00302','KDP00305','KDP00402','KIOM00602','KIOM00603','KIOM00604') for only comp_codes ('0550', '0475', '0403')
select * EXCEPT(Exclude_Com_Codes)
From (
SELECT 
  cast(CONCAT(SUBSTRING(fiscper, 0, 4), '-', SUBSTRING(fiscper, 6, 2), '-01') as date) AS FormatedDate,
  fiscper,
  comp_code,
  bic_chversion,
  bic_csubkbi,
  Sum(fltp) as kbi_value,
  Case when bic_csubkbi in ('KIOM00501','KIOM00502','KIOM00504','KIOM03101') and comp_code in ('0475') and bic_chversion = '0000' then 1 
        when bic_csubkbi = 'KDP00310' and comp_code <> '0475' and bic_chversion = '0000' then 1 else 0 end as Exclude_Com_Codes,
    'ca_kbi51r' as Source

FROM david_test_metrics.test_schema.ca_kbi51r_sub_kbis_upload_rt 
where 1=1 
and cast(left(fiscper,4 ) as INT) >= YEAR(CURRENT_DATE) - 3 and cast(left(fiscper,4 ) as INT) <= YEAR(CURRENT_DATE)
and bic_chversion = '0000'
and bic_csubkbi IN ('KDP00310','KDP00302','KDP00305','KDP00402','KIOM00601','KIOM00602','KIOM00603','KIOM00604','KIOM00605','KIOM00606')
and comp_code  in ('0550', '0475', '0403')
and bic_chcurtype is null

GROUP BY all
)
where Exclude_Com_Codes=0


", null, [EnableFolding=true]),
    #"Kept First Rows" = Table.FirstN(Source ,#"RowLimit"),
    Result = if #"RowLimit" > 0 then #"Kept First Rows" else Source,
    #"Filtered Rows" = Table.SelectRows(Result, each true)
in
    #"Filtered Rows"

expressions.name: bpc003_PL
expressions.expression:
let 

    Source = Value.NativeQuery(C_data_mesh,

    "select cast(CONCAT(SUBSTRING(fiscper, 0, 4), '-', SUBSTRING(fiscper, 6, 2), '-01') as date) AS FormatedDate,
    fiscper,
    bic_cconsunit as comp_code,
        bic_chversion,
    sum(case when fis_code in ('DFA','DB') then kbi_value end ) as  NSR,
    sum(case when fis_code in ('DC2','DFB') then kbi_value end ) as COGS,
    sum(case when fis_code in ('DCC3','DCC1','DCCE','DCCN','DCCY','DCEJ','DCEZ','DCEK','DCD2','DHG2','DHH2')  then kbi_value end ) as SC_Cost_Ex_env_Fees_taxes,
    'bpc003_PL' as Source

 FROM david_test_metrics.test_schema.dc_datalake_prod_001__udm_datamart_bcs__bpc003_profit_and_loss_actuals 
where 1=1 
and fis_code in ('DFA','DB','DC2','DFB','DCC3','DCC1','DCCE','DCCN','DCCY','DCEJ','DCEZ','DCEK','DCD2','DHG2','DHH2')
and cast(left(fiscper,4 ) as INT) >= YEAR(CURRENT_DATE) - 3 and cast(left(fiscper,4 ) as INT) <= YEAR(CURRENT_DATE)
and bic_chversion in ('0000','B000')
and bic_chcurtype='30'
and bic_ccons_grp='G.LOCAL'
group by all

    ", 

    null, 

    [EnableFolding=true]),
 
    #"Kept First Rows" = Table.FirstN(Source, RowLimit),

    Result = if RowLimit > 0 then #"Kept First Rows" else Source,
 
    #"Filtered Rows" = Table.SelectRows(Result, each true),
    #"Replaced Value" = Table.ReplaceValue(#"Filtered Rows","C","",Replacer.ReplaceText,{"comp_code"}),
    #"Unpivoted Columns" = Table.UnpivotOtherColumns(#"Replaced Value", {"FormatedDate","fiscper", "comp_code", "bic_chversion", "Source"}, "bic_csubkbi", "kbi_value")
in
    #"Unpivoted Columns"

expressions.name: bpc016_nom
expressions.expression:
let
Source = Value.NativeQuery(C_data_mesh,"

  select cast(CONCAT(SUBSTRING(nom.fiscper, 0, 4), '-', SUBSTRING(nom.fiscper, 6, 2), '-01') as date) AS FormatedDate,
  fiscper,comp_code,bic_chversion,kbi as bic_csubkbi,kbi_value
, SUM(nom.kbi_value) OVER (PARTITION BY nom.bic_chcurtype,nom.bic_chversion,nom.comp_code,nom.bic_ccons_grp,nom.kbi,Year(cast(CONCAT(SUBSTRING(nom.fiscper, 0, 4), '-', SUBSTRING(nom.fiscper, 6, 2), '-01') as date) ) ORDER BY Month(cast(CONCAT(SUBSTRING(nom.fiscper, 0, 4), '-', SUBSTRING(nom.fiscper, 6, 2), '-01') as date) )) AS RunningTotal
from (
 SELECT fiscper,bic_chcurtype,bic_chversion,comp_code,bic_ccons_grp,kbi,sum(kbi_value) as kbi_value ,
        sha1(concat_ws(fiscper,bic_chcurtype,bic_chversion,comp_code,bic_ccons_grp,kbi)) as Nom_Key,'Nom' as kbi_type

from david_test_metrics.test_schema.bpc016_working_capital   

where bic_ccons_grp='G.LOCAL' 
and cast(left(fiscper,4 ) as INT) >= YEAR(CURRENT_DATE) - 3 and cast(left(fiscper,4 ) as INT) <= YEAR(CURRENT_DATE)
and fiscper not like '%000'
and bic_chversion in ('0000','B000')
and kbi in ('total_inventory_report','concentrate_report','inventories_other_rp_materials_report','inventory_finished_goods_report','inventories_other_report')
group by all
) as nom 
where 1=1

", null, [EnableFolding=true]),
    #"Kept First Rows" = Table.FirstN(Source ,#"RowLimit"),
    Result = if #"RowLimit" > 0 then #"Kept First Rows" else Source,
    #"Added Custom" = Table.AddColumn(Result, "Source", each "bpc016_nom")
in
    #"Added Custom"

expressions.name: bpc016_denom
expressions.expression:
let
Source = Value.NativeQuery(C_data_mesh,"
with Inv_CTE( Select formatted_date,fiscper,bic_chcurtype,comp_code,bic_ccons_grp,Kbi,
            Sum(CASE WHEN bic_chversion = '0000' and kbi  = 'total_inventory_report' THEN if(Month(formatted_date) = 1 ,null,kbi_value/2) 
                     WHEN bic_chversion = '0000' THEN if(Month(formatted_date) = 1 ,null,kbi_value) 
            END) AS A000,
            Sum(CASE WHEN bic_chversion = '0000' THEN kbi_value/2 END) AS A012,
            Sum(CASE WHEN bic_chversion = 'B000' THEN if(Month(formatted_date) = 1 ,null,kbi_value) END) AS B000,
            Sum(CASE WHEN bic_chversion = 'B000' THEN kbi_value END) AS B012,
            Sum(CASE WHEN bic_chversion = 'R040' THEN kbi_value END) AS R040,
            Sum(CASE WHEN bic_chversion = 'R040' and (Month(formatted_date) >= 5 and Month(formatted_date) <=7 ) THEN kbi_value END) AS R040_RE,
            Sum(CASE WHEN bic_chversion = 'R070' THEN kbi_value END) AS R070,
            Sum(CASE WHEN bic_chversion = 'R070' and (Month(formatted_date) >= 8 and Month(formatted_date) <=10 ) THEN kbi_value END) AS R070_RE,
            Sum(CASE WHEN bic_chversion = 'R100' THEN kbi_value END) AS R100,
            Sum(CASE WHEN bic_chversion = 'R100' and (Month(formatted_date) >= 11 and Month(formatted_date) <=12 ) THEN kbi_value END) AS R100_RE

    from (
 SELECT CAST(CONCAT(LEFT(fiscper, 4), '-', RIGHT(fiscper, 2) , '-01') AS DATE)as formatted_date,fiscper,bic_chcurtype,bic_chversion,comp_code,bic_ccons_grp,
    Case 
        when kbi='denomfor_inventory_days' then 'total_inventory_report' 
        when kbi='denom_for_concentrate_ytd_plan_hidden' then 'denom_for_concentrate_ytd_plan_hidden' 
        when kbi='denom_for_inventory_other_ytd_plan_hidden' then 'denom_for_inventory_other_ytd_plan_hidden' 
        when kbi ='denom_for_other_rp_ytd_plan_hidden' then 'denom_for_other_rp_ytd_plan_hidden'
        end as kbi,Sum(kbi_value) as kbi_value
from david_test_metrics.test_schema.bpc016_working_capital
where 1=1 
and bic_ccons_grp='G.LOCAL' 
and cast(left(fiscper,4 ) as INT) >= YEAR(CURRENT_DATE) - 2 and cast(left(fiscper,4 ) as INT) <= YEAR(CURRENT_DATE)
and fiscper not like '%000'
and kbi  in ( 'denomfor_inventory_days' ,'denom_for_concentrate_ytd_plan_hidden','denom_for_inventory_other_ytd_plan_hidden','denom_for_other_rp_ytd_plan_hidden')
group by all

) as prep 
Group by all),

 REC_PAY_CTE( Select formatted_date,fiscper,bic_chcurtype,comp_code,bic_ccons_grp,KBI,
            Sum(CASE WHEN bic_chversion = '0000' THEN kbi_value END) AS A000,
            Sum(CASE WHEN bic_chversion = 'B000' THEN kbi_value END) AS B000,
            Sum(CASE WHEN bic_chversion = 'R040' THEN kbi_value END) AS R040,
            Sum(CASE WHEN bic_chversion = 'R070' THEN kbi_value END) AS R070,
            Sum(CASE WHEN bic_chversion = 'R100' THEN kbi_value END) AS R100
    from (
 SELECT CAST(CONCAT(LEFT(fiscper, 4), '-', RIGHT(fiscper, 2) , '-01') AS DATE)as formatted_date,fiscper, bic_chcurtype,bic_chversion,comp_code,bic_ccons_grp,
    Case 
        when kbi='credit_purchases_ytd_act' then 'total_payables_report'
        when kbi='ytd_pre_payables_denom_plan_hidden' then 'total_payables_report'
        when kbi='ytd_credit_purchases_bp_hidden' then 'total_payables_report'
        when kbi='denom_for_receivables_report' then 'total_receivables_report' 
        end as kbi,Sum( Case 
        when kbi='ytd_pre_payables_denom_plan_hidden' and bic_chversion = '0000' then NULL
        when kbi='ytd_pre_payables_denom_plan_hidden' and bic_chversion = 'B000' then NULL else kbi_value end ) as kbi_value
from david_test_metrics.test_schema.bpc016_working_capital
where 1=1 
and bic_ccons_grp='G.LOCAL' 
and cast(left(fiscper,4 ) as INT) >= YEAR(CURRENT_DATE) - 1 and cast(left(fiscper,4 ) as INT) <= YEAR(CURRENT_DATE)
and kbi  in  ('denom_for_receivables_report','credit_purchases_ytd_act','ytd_credit_purchases_bp_hidden','ytd_pre_payables_denom_plan_hidden')
group by all

) as prep 

group by all)

Select formatted_date,fiscper,bic_chcurtype,comp_code,bic_ccons_grp,Kbi,Actual_Days_Denom as A000,BP_Days_Denom as BP000,
                 Case when Month(formatted_date) >= 1 and Month(formatted_date) <=3 Then null
                    When Month(formatted_date) = 4 Then 
                                LAG(actual_days_denom) OVER (PARTITION BY Kbi,bic_chcurtype,comp_code,bic_ccons_grp,Year(formatted_date) ORDER BY Month(formatted_date))
                            +   LEAD(R040_RE) OVER (PARTITION BY Kbi,bic_chcurtype,comp_code,bic_ccons_grp,Year(formatted_date) ORDER BY Month(formatted_date))
                    When Month(formatted_date) = 5 Then 
                                LAG(actual_days_denom,2) OVER (PARTITION BY Kbi,bic_chcurtype,comp_code,bic_ccons_grp,Year(formatted_date) ORDER BY Month(formatted_date))
                            +  Sum(R040_RE) OVER (PARTITION BY Kbi,bic_chcurtype,comp_code,bic_ccons_grp,Year(formatted_date) ORDER BY Month(formatted_date))
                            +  LEAD(R040_RE) OVER (PARTITION BY Kbi,bic_chcurtype,comp_code,bic_ccons_grp,Year(formatted_date) ORDER BY Month(formatted_date))
                    When Month(formatted_date) = 6 Then 
                                LAG(actual_days_denom,3) OVER (PARTITION BY Kbi,bic_chcurtype,comp_code,bic_ccons_grp,Year(formatted_date) ORDER BY Month(formatted_date))
                            +  Sum(R040_RE) OVER (PARTITION BY Kbi,bic_chcurtype,comp_code,bic_ccons_grp,Year(formatted_date) ORDER BY Month(formatted_date))
                            +  LEAD(R040_RE) OVER (PARTITION BY Kbi,bic_chcurtype,comp_code,bic_ccons_grp,Year(formatted_date) ORDER BY Month(formatted_date))
                    When Month(formatted_date) = 7 Then 
                                LAG(actual_days_denom) OVER (PARTITION BY Kbi,bic_chcurtype,comp_code,bic_ccons_grp,Year(formatted_date) ORDER BY Month(formatted_date))
                            +   LEAD(R070_RE) OVER (PARTITION BY Kbi,bic_chcurtype,comp_code,bic_ccons_grp,Year(formatted_date) ORDER BY Month(formatted_date))
                  When Month(formatted_date) = 8 Then 
                                LAG(actual_days_denom,2) OVER (PARTITION BY Kbi,bic_chcurtype,comp_code,bic_ccons_grp,Year(formatted_date) ORDER BY Month(formatted_date))
                            +  Sum(R070_RE) OVER (PARTITION BY Kbi,bic_chcurtype,comp_code,bic_ccons_grp,Year(formatted_date) ORDER BY Month(formatted_date))
                            +  LEAD(R070_RE) OVER (PARTITION BY Kbi,bic_chcurtype,comp_code,bic_ccons_grp,Year(formatted_date) ORDER BY Month(formatted_date))
                    When Month(formatted_date) = 9 Then 
                                LAG(actual_days_denom,3) OVER (PARTITION BY Kbi,bic_chcurtype,comp_code,bic_ccons_grp,Year(formatted_date) ORDER BY Month(formatted_date))
                            +  Sum(R070_RE) OVER (PARTITION BY Kbi,bic_chcurtype,comp_code,bic_ccons_grp,Year(formatted_date) ORDER BY Month(formatted_date))
                            +  LEAD(R070_RE) OVER (PARTITION BY Kbi,bic_chcurtype,comp_code,bic_ccons_grp,Year(formatted_date) ORDER BY Month(formatted_date))
                    When Month(formatted_date) = 10 Then 
                                LAG(actual_days_denom) OVER (PARTITION BY Kbi,bic_chcurtype,comp_code,bic_ccons_grp,Year(formatted_date) ORDER BY Month(formatted_date))
                            +   LEAD(R100_RE) OVER (PARTITION BY Kbi,bic_chcurtype,comp_code,bic_ccons_grp,Year(formatted_date) ORDER BY Month(formatted_date))
                  When Month(formatted_date) = 11 Then 
                                LAG(actual_days_denom,2) OVER (PARTITION BY Kbi,bic_chcurtype,comp_code,bic_ccons_grp,Year(formatted_date) ORDER BY Month(formatted_date))
                            +  Sum(R100_RE) OVER (PARTITION BY Kbi,bic_chcurtype,comp_code,bic_ccons_grp,Year(formatted_date) ORDER BY Month(formatted_date))
                            +  LEAD(R100_RE) OVER (PARTITION BY Kbi,bic_chcurtype,comp_code,bic_ccons_grp,Year(formatted_date) ORDER BY Month(formatted_date))
                  When Month(formatted_date) = 12 Then  
                            Sum(R100) OVER (PARTITION BY Kbi,bic_chcurtype,comp_code,bic_ccons_grp,Year(formatted_date) ORDER BY Month(formatted_date))   

                    End
                    AS RE000, null as PY_Denom

From (

select formatted_date,fiscper,bic_chcurtype,comp_code,bic_ccons_grp, R040_RE,R070_RE,R100_RE,r100,Kbi,
        if (Month(formatted_date) = 1 ,  LEAD(B000) OVER (PARTITION BY Kbi,bic_chcurtype,comp_code,bic_ccons_grp,Year(formatted_date) ORDER BY Month(formatted_date)) ,
        if (Month(formatted_date) = 2 ,  A000 + 
        LEAD(B000) OVER (PARTITION BY Kbi,bic_chcurtype,comp_code,bic_ccons_grp,Year(formatted_date) ORDER BY Month(formatted_date)),
        if (Month(formatted_date) >= 3 and Month(formatted_date) <=5 ,
            SUM(A000) OVER (
           PARTITION BY Kbi,bic_chcurtype,comp_code,bic_ccons_grp,Year(formatted_date) ORDER BY Month(formatted_date)
            ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)
        + LEAD(R040) OVER (PARTITION BY Kbi,bic_chcurtype,comp_code,bic_ccons_grp,Year(formatted_date) ORDER BY Month(formatted_date)),
         if (Month(formatted_date) >= 6 and Month(formatted_date) <=8 ,
            SUM(A000) OVER (
           PARTITION BY Kbi,bic_chcurtype,comp_code,bic_ccons_grp,Year(formatted_date) ORDER BY Month(formatted_date)
            ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)
        + LEAD(R070) OVER (PARTITION BY Kbi,bic_chcurtype,comp_code,bic_ccons_grp,Year(formatted_date) ORDER BY Month(formatted_date)),
        if (Month(formatted_date) >= 9 and Month(formatted_date) <12 ,
            SUM(A000) OVER (
           PARTITION BY Kbi,bic_chcurtype,comp_code,bic_ccons_grp,Year(formatted_date) ORDER BY Month(formatted_date)
            ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)
        + LEAD(R100) OVER (PARTITION BY Kbi,bic_chcurtype,comp_code,bic_ccons_grp,Year(formatted_date) ORDER BY Month(formatted_date)),
        Case when kbi = 'total_inventory_report' then SUM(A012) OVER (
           PARTITION BY Kbi,bic_chcurtype,comp_code,bic_ccons_grp,Year(formatted_date) ORDER BY Month(formatted_date))
             when kbi in ( 'denom_for_concentrate_ytd_plan_hidden','denom_for_inventory_other_ytd_plan_hidden','denom_for_other_rp_ytd_plan_hidden') then SUM(A012) OVER (
           PARTITION BY Kbi,bic_chcurtype,comp_code,bic_ccons_grp,Year(formatted_date) ORDER BY Month(formatted_date))
           *2 end
           )))))
         AS Actual_Days_Denom,
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
            if (Month(formatted_date) = 1 ,  LEAD(B000) OVER (PARTITION BY Kbi,bic_chcurtype,comp_code,bic_ccons_grp,Year(formatted_date) ORDER BY Month(formatted_date)) ,
            if (Month(formatted_date) >= 2 and Month(formatted_date) <12 ,
            SUM(B000) OVER (PARTITION BY Kbi,bic_chcurtype,comp_code,bic_ccons_grp,Year(formatted_date) ORDER BY Month(formatted_date) ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)
            + 
            LEAD(B000) OVER (PARTITION BY Kbi,bic_chcurtype,comp_code,bic_ccons_grp,Year(formatted_date) ORDER BY Month(formatted_date)),
            SUM(B012) OVER (PARTITION BY Kbi,bic_chcurtype,comp_code,bic_ccons_grp,Year(formatted_date) ORDER BY Month(formatted_date))))
         AS BP_Days_Denom

from Inv_CTE
) as Actual_BP

Union all

select formatted_date,fiscper,bic_chcurtype,comp_code,bic_ccons_grp,kbi
            ,Sum(A000) OVER (PARTITION BY kbi,bic_chcurtype,comp_code,bic_ccons_grp,kbi,Year(formatted_date) ORDER BY Month(formatted_date)) as A000 
            ,Sum(B000) OVER (PARTITION BY kbi,bic_chcurtype,comp_code,bic_ccons_grp,kbi,Year(formatted_date) ORDER BY Month(formatted_date)) as B000
            ,Case When Month(formatted_date) <=3 then Null 
                 When Month(formatted_date) >=4 and Month(formatted_date) <=6 then Sum(R040) 
                    OVER (PARTITION BY kbi,bic_chcurtype,comp_code,bic_ccons_grp,Year(formatted_date) ORDER BY Month(formatted_date))
                When Month(formatted_date) >=7 and Month(formatted_date) <=9 then Sum(R070) 
                    OVER (PARTITION BY kbi,bic_chcurtype,comp_code,bic_ccons_grp,Year(formatted_date) ORDER BY Month(formatted_date))
                When Month(formatted_date) >=10 and Month(formatted_date) <=12 then Sum(R100)
                    OVER (PARTITION BY kbi,bic_chcurtype,comp_code,bic_ccons_grp,Year(formatted_date) ORDER BY Month(formatted_date))
                    End as RE000, null as PY_Denom

from REC_PAY_CTE
", null, [EnableFolding=true]),
    #"Kept First Rows" = Table.FirstN(Source ,#"RowLimit"),
    Result = if #"RowLimit" > 0 then #"Kept First Rows" else Source,
    #"Added Custom" = Table.AddColumn(Result, "Source", each "bpc016_denom"),
    #"Removed Other Columns" = Table.SelectColumns(#"Added Custom",{"Source", "BP000", "A000", "Kbi", "comp_code", "formatted_date","fiscper"}),
    #"Unpivoted Columns" = Table.UnpivotOtherColumns(#"Removed Other Columns", {"Source", "Kbi", "comp_code", "formatted_date","fiscper"}, "bic_chversion", "RunningTotal"),
    #"Replaced Value" = Table.ReplaceValue(#"Unpivoted Columns","A000","0000",Replacer.ReplaceText,{"bic_chversion"}),
    #"Replaced Value1" = Table.ReplaceValue(#"Replaced Value","BP000","B000",Replacer.ReplaceText,{"bic_chversion"}),
    #"Renamed Columns" = Table.RenameColumns(#"Replaced Value1",{{"Kbi", "bic_csubkbi"}, {"formatted_date", "FormatedDate"}}),
    #"Replaced Value2" = Table.ReplaceValue(#"Renamed Columns","total_inventory_report","denomfor_inventory_days",Replacer.ReplaceText,{"bic_csubkbi"}),
    #"Filtered Rows" = Table.SelectRows(#"Replaced Value2", each ([comp_code] <> "0798" and [comp_code] <> "0523"))
in
    #"Filtered Rows"

tables.name: airports
tables.description: The table contains information about airports, including their locations by city, state, and country, as well as their corresponding IATA codes. This data can be useful for analyzing airport distribution, planning airline routes, and understanding regional air travel connectivity.

columns.name: City
columns.description: Represents the city where the airport is located, providing a geographical reference for the airport.

columns.name: State
columns.description: Indicates the state in which the airport resides, useful for regional identification.

columns.name: Country
columns.description: Denotes the country that hosts the airport, essential for international context and travel.

columns.name: IATA
columns.description: Contains the three-letter International Air Transport Association code uniquely identifying the airport, which is important for ticketing and flight information.

source.expression:
let
                Source = Databricks.Catalogs(ServerHostname, HTTPPath, [Catalog=null, Database=null,
                    EnableAutomaticProxyDiscovery=null, EnableQueryResultDownload="1"]),
                Database = Source{[Name="main",Kind="Database"]}[Data],
                Schema = Database{[Name="airlinedata_david_ezeike",Kind="Schema"]}[Data],
                Table = Schema{[Name="airports",Kind="Table"]}[Data]
            in
                Table

tables.name: flights
tables.description: The table contains data related to flight schedules and performance. It includes information on flight times, delays, cancellations, and the operating carriers. Use cases include analyzing on-time performance, understanding delays by cause, and tracking trends across different routes or time periods.

columns.name: Year
columns.description: The calendar year when the flight took place.

columns.name: Month
columns.description: The calendar month when the flight took place, represented as a number from 1 to 12.

columns.name: DayofMonth
columns.description: The day of the month when the flight was scheduled.

columns.name: DayOfWeek
columns.description: The day of the week for the flight, represented numerically from 1 (Monday) to 7 (Sunday).

columns.name: DepTime
columns.description: The actual departure time of the flight, recorded in local time.

columns.name: CRSDepTime
columns.description: The scheduled departure time according to the airline's computer reservation system.

columns.name: ArrTime
columns.description: The actual arrival time of the flight, recorded in local time.

columns.name: CRSArrTime
columns.description: The scheduled arrival time according to the airline's computer reservation system.

columns.name: UniqueCarrier
columns.description: The airline code identifying the carrier operating the flight.

columns.name: FlightNum
columns.description: The flight number designated by the carrier for the specific flight.

columns.name: TailNum
columns.description: The unique tail number of the aircraft used for the flight.

columns.name: ActualElapsedTime
columns.description: The total elapsed time of the flight from departure to arrival, including taxi times.

columns.name: CRSElapsedTime
columns.description: The scheduled elapsed time for the flight according to the reservation system.

columns.name: AirTime
columns.description: The time the aircraft spends in the air during the flight, excluding taxi times.

columns.name: ArrDelay
columns.description: The number of minutes the flight arrival was delayed compared to the scheduled arrival time.

columns.name: DepDelay
columns.description: The number of minutes the flight departure was delayed compared to the scheduled departure time.

columns.name: Origin
columns.description: The airport code where the flight originated.

columns.name: Dest
columns.description: The airport code where the flight was destined.

columns.name: Distance
columns.description: The flight distance between the origin and destination airports, typically measured in miles.

columns.name: TaxiIn
columns.description: The time (in minutes) the aircraft spent taxiing in from the runway to the gate after landing.

columns.name: TaxiOut
columns.description: The time (in minutes) the aircraft spent taxiing from the gate to the runway before takeoff.

columns.name: Cancelled
columns.description: Indicates whether the flight was cancelled (1 for cancelled, 0 for not cancelled).

columns.name: CancellationCode
columns.description: The reason code for flight cancellation, if applicable (e.g., weather, carrier).

columns.name: Diverted
columns.description: Indicates whether the flight was diverted to a different airport (1 for diverted, 0 otherwise).

columns.name: CarrierDelay
columns.description: The delay in minutes attributed to the carrier's operations.

columns.name: WeatherDelay
columns.description: The delay in minutes caused by weather conditions.

columns.name: NASDelay
columns.description: The delay in minutes caused by the National Airspace System constraints.

columns.name: SecurityDelay
columns.description: The delay in minutes caused by security issues.

columns.name: LateAircraftDelay
columns.description: The delay in minutes caused by the late arrival of the aircraft from a previous flight.

columns.name: IsArrDelayed
columns.description: Indicates if the flight arrival was delayed (YES or NO).

columns.name: IsDepDelayed
columns.description: Indicates if the flight departure was delayed (YES or NO).

columns.name: Date
columns.description: The full date of the flight in YYYY-MM-DD format.

tables.name: lookupcodes
tables.description: This table contains a set of lookup codes alongside their descriptions. It is useful for referencing standardized codes within our airline data, helping to translate codes into human-readable descriptions. Typical use cases include data validation, mapping codes in other datasets, and improving the clarity of reports or data analyses that involve coded information.

columns.name: UniqueCode
columns.description: A unique identifier for each code entry used to lookup and reference specific information across related datasets.

columns.name: Description
columns.description: A textual explanation providing details about what each unique code represents or signifies.

tables.name: sales_metrics
tables.description: Retail sales metrics — grain: one row per sale transaction. Source: fact_sales joined to dim_product, dim_store, dim_customer. Answers revenue, order volume, and average order value questions sliced by product category, store region, and customer.

columns.name: Product Category
columns.description: Product category from dim_product

columns.name: Region
columns.description: Sales region from dim_store (West, East, Central, South)

columns.name: Customer Email
columns.description: Customer email — column-masked for non-admin users via email_mask function

columns.name: Sale Date
columns.description: Date key of the sale (YYYYMMDD format, FK to dim_date)

columns.name: Total Revenue
columns.description: Sum of total_amount (after discount) — the single source of truth for revenue
